mapper.sql: id, dorm_name, region, address, dorm_condition, total_rooms, memo1, memo2, memo3, status, version, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_dormitory ( dorm_name, region, address, dorm_condition, total_rooms, memo1, memo2, memo3, status, version, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{dormName}, #{region}, #{address}, #{dormCondition}, #{totalRooms}, #{memo1}, #{memo2}, #{memo3}, COALESCE(#{status}, 1), 0, #{createBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tbl_dormitory
dorm_name = #{dormName},
region = #{region},
address = #{address},
dorm_condition = #{dormCondition},
total_rooms = #{totalRooms},
memo1 = #{memo1},
memo2 = #{memo2},
memo3 = #{memo3},
status = #{status},
version = version + 1,
update_by = #{updateBy},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_dormitory WHERE status = 1
SELECT region, COUNT(*) AS totalRooms FROM tbl_dormitory WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY region ORDER BY region ASC
